description: Register transform.parse_json as a pure Transform action with explicit input/output schemas.
Allow transform.parse_json to parse JSON strings into structured values.
Allow transform.parse_json to pass through static literal objects and arrays without reparsing.
Return transform.parse_json output as a wrapper containing value and detected JSON type.
Fail transform.parse_json with an actionable error when string input is invalid JSON.
Register transform.query_json as a pure Transform action with explicit input/output schemas.
Evaluate transform.query_json expressions against a provided source value exposed as source.
Expose current workflow expression context to transform.query_json as payload, vars, meta, and error where available.
Apply existing workflow expression validation, allow-listed functions, timeout, JSON-serializable result, and max output size rules to transform.query_json.
Return transform.query_json output as a wrapper containing the evaluated value.
Register transform.stringify_json if included in the first implementation, with source and optional spacing inputs and text output.
Ensure all new JSON Transform actions are sideEffectful false and use engine-provided idempotency.
Ensure new JSON Transform actions appear under the existing Transform palette/catalog group.
Ensure saved JSON Transform outputs work with existing action.call saveAs behavior and downstream expression references.
Add or reuse an expression helper path so transform.query_json can evaluate against a custom source without duplicating unsafe expression logic.
Add clear runtime error messages for parse failures, expression validation failures, and expression evaluation failures.
Update Alga AI system prompt or prompt context with workflow JSON Transform action names and usage guidance.
Include JSONata examples in AI guidance for field extraction, object construction, defaults/coalesce, array map/filter, and saveAs references.
Ensure AI guidance tells users where to paste expressions and does not claim that AI runs inside workflow execution.
Preserve existing Quick Ask/chat endpoint entitlement checks for AI-assisted authoring.
If the lightweight Ask AI trigger is included, render it only when AI Assistant entitlement and feature access are available.
If the lightweight Ask AI trigger is included, make it open/seed existing Quick Ask rather than introducing a separate AI panel or required workflow path.
Document or guard the risk of saving parsed secret-derived JSON into workflow payload/vars.
Keep all existing workflows and transform actions backward-compatible.
